expected_outcomes.name: green path
expected_outcomes.description: The gate-green, human-ratified candidate is promoted and inscribed into lineage.

expected_outcomes.name: gate-red path
expected_outcomes.description: The regression report is rejected by the deterministic pre-registration gate.

expected_outcomes.name: preflight breaker
expected_outcomes.description: A proposed frozen-path change trips the preflight breaker before builder invocation.
